ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "NDCG_at_5" REAL /* Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at 5 */,
  "NDCG" REAL /* Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain */,
  "AP" REAL /* Average Precision */,
  "RR" REAL /* Recall Rate */,
  "RBP_80" REAL /* Rank Biased Precision at 80% */,
  "RBP_90" REAL /* Rank Biased Precision at 90% */,
  "RBP_95" REAL /* Rank Biased Precision at 95% */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, data scientist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_over_time" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "NDCG" REAL /* Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain */,
  "AP" REAL /* Average Precision */,
  "RR" REAL /* Recall Rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "evaluation_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_split" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of split (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "split_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "hyperparameter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborators" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each metric entry
ID of the model being evaluated
ID of the dataset used for evaluation
Date when the evaluation was performed
ID of the user who performed the evaluation
Unique identifier for each model version
Date when the version was released
Description of changes made in this version
Role of the user (e.g., customer, data scientist)
Date when the evaluation was performed
